distractors.off_target_set: Decisions with no identifiable bias risk; situations where the bias is already corrected by process; meta-questions about debiasing techniques
distractors.description: Items where cognitive biases are not a meaningful threat to decision quality, or where the decision process already neutralizes them

decision_gate.elevate: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_delta_pp >= 5 AND replication_paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_direction_matches_primary AND calibration_improvement >= 0.02
decision_gate.directional_not_replicated: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND (replication_delta_pp < 5 OR replication_paired_test_p >= 0.05 OR replication_direction_opposite)
